message: Node started: Derive the expression for the flat-space Unruh temperature T_U(a) in terms of acceleration a and Planck constant, Boltzmann constant, and speed of light. Then, derive the de Sitter temperature T_dS(a) by incorporating the cosmological constant or de Sitter horizon effects, specifically looking for how the acceleration is modified by the de Sitter background. Identify the functional form of the ratio T_U(a)/T_dS(a).
